chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-32 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 23.10.2025 Ms.Sana Memon, A.P.G ******** Applicant Allah Ditto is present in person and submits that he does not wish to press this Criminal Revision Application. On the last date of hearing, this Court had imposed a cost of Rs. 2,000/- to be deposited by the applicant in the High Court Clinic. In view of the circumstances, the order directing deposit of cost is recalled. Accordingly, this Criminal Revision Application is dismissed as withdrawn in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
